requirement_topic.en: ELES Grid Connection — 230/400 V 50 Hz Slovenian Network
requirement_topic.zh: ELES并网接入——斯洛文尼亚230/400 V 50 Hz电网
requirement_topic.zht: ELES併網接入——斯洛維尼亞230/400 V 50 Hz電網

summary.en: Slovenia electricity supply is managed at the transmission level by ELES (the national TSO), with sector oversight by Agencija za energijo (Agen-E). The low-voltage context is 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase at 50 Hz — the standard EU voltage level. That is the same frequency as China but a different nominal voltage from China's 220/380 V baseline. Grid-connected charger projects should be treated as site-specific electrical installations requiring ELES/distribution operator supply-capacity review, protection coordination, metering, earthing, harmonic and power-quality review, commissioning, and written project acceptance before energisation. Slovenian-language documentation is commonly required.
summary.zh: 斯洛文尼亚电力供应在输电层面由ELES（国家TSO）管理，并由Agencija za energijo（Agen-E）监管。低压电网环境为230 V单相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz——标准欧盟电压等级。其频率与中国相同，但标称电压不同于中国220/380 V基线。并网充电桩项目应作为特定场址电气安装处理，需在通电前完成ELES/配电运营商供电容量审查、保护配合、计量、接地、谐波和电能质量审查、调试及书面项目验收。通常要求提供斯洛文尼亚语文件。
summary.zht: 斯洛維尼亞電力供應在輸電層面由ELES（國家TSO）管理，並由Agencija za energijo（Agen-E）監管。低壓電網環境為230 V單相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz——標準歐盟電壓等級。其頻率與中國相同，但標稱電壓不同於中國220/380 V基線。併網充電樁項目應作為特定場址電氣安裝處理，需在通電前完成ELES/配電運營商供電容量審查、保護配合、計量、接地、諧波和電能質量審查、調試及書面項目驗收。通常要求提供斯洛維尼亞語文件。

standards_or_laws: ELES (Slovenian TSO) electricity network connection and project acceptance
IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility and power quality
IEC 61851-1 — EV conductive charging system general requirements

summary.en: China domestic charger installations are commonly documented under GB/T 18487.1-2023, GB/T 20234 connector standards, GB/T 27930-2023 for DC communication, and local grid-operator acceptance. China domestic supply is 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase at 50 Hz. The shared 50 Hz frequency does not mean voltage equivalence: Slovenia 230/400 V requires input-voltage, protection-threshold, thermal, and metering validation beyond the China baseline.
summary.zh: 中国国内充电桩安装通常依据GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234接口标准、直流通信GB/T 27930-2023以及当地电网运营商验收准备文件。中国国内供电为220 V单相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz。相同50 Hz频率不等于电压等同：斯洛文尼亚230/400 V要求在中国基线之外重新确认输入电压、保护阈值、热设计和计量。
summary.zht: 中國國內充電樁安裝通常依據GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234接口標準、直流通訊GB/T 27930-2023以及當地電網運營商驗收準備文件。中國國內供電為220 V單相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz。相同50 Hz頻率不等於電壓等同：斯洛維尼亞230/400 V要求在中國基線之外重新確認輸入電壓、保護閾值、熱設計和計量。

standards_or_laws: China local grid operator project-acceptance requirements

gap.en: Exporters must confirm that the charger covers 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase at 50 Hz, not only China's 220/380 V settings. Protection thresholds, leakage-current devices, metering accuracy, harmonic emissions, supply-capacity calculations, earthing, surge protection, and commissioning documents should be prepared for ELES/distribution operator review. Documentation should be available in Slovenian as required by local authorities. For commercial and public sites, load management and demand limits should be agreed with the distribution operator before shipment.
gap.zh: 出口商必须确认充电桩覆盖230 V单相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz，而不仅是中国220/380 V设置。保护阈值、漏电保护器件、计量准确度、谐波排放、供电容量计算、接地、浪涌保护和调试文件应按ELES/配电运营商审查准备。文件须按当地主管机构要求提供斯洛文尼亚语版本。对于商业和公共场所，应在出货前与配电运营商确认负载管理和需量限制。
gap.zht: 出口商必須確認充電樁覆蓋230 V單相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz，而不僅是中國220/380 V設置。保護閾值、漏電保護器件、計量準確度、諧波排放、供電容量計算、接地、浪湧保護和調試文件應按ELES/配電運營商審查準備。文件須按當地主管機構要求提供斯洛維尼亞語版本。對於商業和公共場所，應在出貨前與配電運營商確認負載管理和需量限制。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — grid-connected installations require ELES/distribution operator project review and acceptance; voltage is 230/400 V at 50 Hz, which differs from China 220/380 V despite the same frequency
mandatory_status.cn: China grid-operator acceptance applies domestically and is not an ELES Slovenia approval substitute; China 220/380 V evidence must be revalidated for Slovenia 230/400 V

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Slovenia-ready EVSE needs ELES/distribution operator project acceptance and explicit 230/400 V 50 Hz validation. Do not describe the voltage as matching China: only the 50 Hz frequency matches, while nominal voltage differs from China's 220/380 V baseline. Slovenian-language documentation is commonly required.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 面向斯洛文尼亚的EVSE需要ELES/配电运营商项目验收，并明确验证230/400 V 50 Hz。不得称其电压与中国相同：只有50 Hz频率相同，标称电压不同于中国220/380 V基线。通常要求提供斯洛文尼亚语文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 面向斯洛維尼亞的EVSE需要ELES/配電運營商項目驗收，並明確驗證230/400 V 50 Hz。不得稱其電壓與中國相同：只有50 Hz頻率相同，標稱電壓不同於中國220/380 V基線。通常要求提供斯洛維尼亞語文件。
